scenarios.name: Intuition is not required for base trust
assertions: Base trust and reconciliation work without Intuition.
Intuition remains a later Mamba-gated capability rather than a Phase 1 prerequisite.

scenarios.name: Session-end reconciliation
assertions: Tentative QMD notions can be promoted, downgraded, or rejected.

scenarios.name: QMD cleanup
assertions: Reflection can prune, merge, and demote low-value notions.
QMD remains lean without becoming the durable authority.

scenarios.name: Nightly maintenance
assertions: Nightly reconciliation can merge, supersede, or invalidate memory safely.
Provenance and support links remain intact.
Layer 3 relationships can inform Layer 4 grouping and promotion candidate detection.

non_goals: Using nightly maintenance as the only trust boundary
